name: Chicken Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces lasagna noodles, cooked as directed
1 package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly coat an 8-inch square baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Cover the bottom of the dish with one-fourth of the cooked noodles.
3. Spread a layer of spinach over the noodles, then add another quarter of the noodles.
4. Spread cottage cheese evenly over the spinach and sprinkle with half the Parmesan cheese.
5. Add a quarter of the creamed chicken on top, followed by the remaining noodles and Parmesan cheese.
6. Place foil in the refrigerator to cool completely.
7. Refrigerate until ready to cook:
- If thawed: 350°F for 30 minutes
- Frozen, foil-wrapped: 1 hour and 30 minutes
